products.name: Shower Panel Set
products.description: Complete overhead shower set with arm, rose, and wall flange. Chrome finish.

products.name: PVC Water Tank (500 L)
products.description: Triple-layer food-grade PVC overhead water storage tank with ISI mark. UV stabilized.

products.name: PVC Water Tank (1000 L)
products.description: 1000-litre triple-layered ISI certified overhead tank. Includes lid, inlet, outlet, overflow.

products.name: Sump Tank (2000 L)
products.description: Underground sump water tank, 2000 litres. Reinforced walls, wide access manhole.

products.name: Submersible Pump (0.5 HP)
products.description: Single-phase submersible borewell pump. Max head 30m, flow 1500 LPH. ISI certified.

products.name: Monoblock Pump (1 HP)
products.description: Self-priming centrifugal monoblock pump. Suitable for water transfer and boosting.

products.name: Jet Pump (1.5 HP)
products.description: High-suction jet pump for shallow-well and overhead tank boosting. Energy efficient motor.

products.name: Pressure Booster Pump
products.description: Automatic pressure booster with pressure tank. Maintains constant water pressure in buildings.

products.name: Borewell Drilling (per foot)
products.description: Professional borewell drilling service with rotary rig. Price per foot. Site visit free.

products.name: Borewell Casing Pipe (6 inch)
products.description: MS/UPVC 6-inch borewell casing pipe. High tensile strength for deep bore installations.

products.name: Borewell Cable Wire
products.description: 3-core submersible cable for underground pump wiring. Waterproof insulation, copper conductor.

reviews.name: Ramesh Kumar
reviews.text: Excellent quality pipes and very reasonable prices. Got my entire borewell setup done by them. Very professional team.

reviews.name: Priya Sundaram
reviews.text: Best hardware shop in Kanchipuram! The sanitary ware collection is stunning and the staff helped me choose the right fittings.

reviews.name: Venkat Rajan
reviews.text: Reliable and trustworthy. Bought a 1000L water tank and pump – both working perfectly. Fast delivery too!

reviews.name: Anitha Devi
reviews.text: Good range of plumbing materials. Prices are competitive. Highly recommend for any plumbing or borewell work.
